vocab.meaning: sự chú ý say mê/chăm chú
vocab.example: As a child, I would watch the changing landscapes with rapt attention, mesmerized by the world passing by.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn trên những bánh xe (không gian an toàn, ấm cúng)
vocab.example: For me, our family sedan was a sanctuary on wheels where I could read my comics in peace during long hauls.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi/kích thích một cảm giác nào đó
vocab.example: The rhythmic humming of the engine used to incite a feeling of tranquility that often put me to sleep.

vocab.meaning: những khung cảnh/tầm nhìn không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Traveling through the countryside offered uninterrupted vistas of green fields that you just don't see in the city.

vocab.meaning: lời ru từ chuyến đi xe (âm thanh xe cộ gây buồn ngủ)
vocab.example: The low vibration of the car acted as a car-ride lullaby, making me drift off almost immediately.

vocab.meaning: sự quá tải về cảm giác (âm thanh, mùi vị, hình ảnh dồn dập)
vocab.example: Sometimes the bustling roadside markets we passed were a sensory overload of vibrant colors and exotic smells.

vocab.meaning: sự chuyển giao về mặt địa lý
vocab.example: I was fascinated by the geographical transition from urban skyscrapers to the rugged beauty of the mountains.
Sharing the compact quarters of the car with my siblings taught us a lot about patience and personal space.

vocab.meaning: một chuyến đi mang tính cột mốc/đáng nhớ
vocab.example: Our first trip to the coast felt like a milestone journey that marked the beginning of my love for travel.
I loved the exhilarating pace of the highway, feeling like we were flying towards our holiday destination.
